title: Switzerland
subTitle: Shibu and Rumi lead a middle-class family life with their children and can only afford to go to local destinations for holidays. One day, they decide to save money for a trip to Switzerland.

title: Tor Naam
subTitle: Tor Naam is a sweet teenage love story which begins in a boarding school in Sikkim and ends with an interesting twist.

title: Bhalobasar Jeet
subTitle: A motherless young man, who hates his father for remarrying, falls in love with a local politician's daughter and invites trouble at his doorstep.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
subTitle: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

subTitle: A young boy's parents are killed by a dangerous criminal who also kidnaps his sister. Several years later, he plans to find his sister and avenge his parents' death by murdering the culprit.

title: Mem Saheb
subTitle: Kajal falls in love with Amit, an unemployed journalist. She urges him to focus on his career and provides unconditional support, but destiny has other plans for the couple.

title: 100 Percent Love
subTitle: Competitive peers Balu and Mahalakshmi have ego clashes while in college. When they meet again after a few years, they try to outdo each other until they realise that they are in love.

title: Beder Meye Josna
subTitle: A prince, bitten by a snake, is saved by the healer Josna, who falls ill in the process. Recovered, she demands his hand in marriage, leading to a royal tug-of-war for love.

title: Abhimanyu
subTitle: Raj Sinha, a policeman, kills gangster Durjo Rai's son in an encounter. He soon asks Abhimanyu, a suspended colleague, to protect the last two members of his family from Rai.

title: Debibaran

subTitle: Jayant, an aspiring singer, finds his way to the city in order to make it big. Soon, he garners accolades for his performances and eventually falls in love with the daughter of a ruthless businessman.

title: Pooja
subTitle: A maidservant witnesses the horrific tortures subjected to her employer's daughter by her in-laws. Eventually, she hatches a plot to infiltrate the house and rescue her mistress.

title: Rupban
subTitle: A 12-year-old Rupban is married to Rahim when he is just 12 days old. However, their lives take a turn when Rahim grows older, only to refuse to accept Rupban as his wife and fall in love with Tajel.

title: Jwar Bhata
subTitle: Bijay, a rich tea estate owner's son, angers his father when he marries a poor girl. Ranjan, his cousin, tries to make the most of the situation by usurping his property.

title: Agaman
subTitle: Binu, a mischievous boy, is forced to leave his village and get separated from Chandra. Binu finds shelter in a theatre group but faces many ups and downs in life before he finally returns home.

title: Priyojon
subTitle: Jamuna's daughter Radha is in love with Amol but no one has a clue about their affair. Jamuna fixes Radha's marriage with another boy and realizes later that she is in love with Amol.

title: Subharatri

title: Mama Bhagne
subTitle: Raja, a lazy man, gets married to Payel under the assumption that she is from a wealthy family. However, he is shocked to learn that Payel's father is a gardener.

title: Agnipath
subTitle: Sujay, Ajay and Bijay are three siblings who share a close bond and can go to any length to protect each other. However, when Sujay is killed by his own boss, Bijay sets out to exact revenge.

title: Baba Keno Chakar
subTitle: When Rajnarayan asks his son to help out with the expenses for his sister's wedding, he refuses. As a result, he is forced to go from pillar to post to make ends meet.

title: Geet Sangeet
subTitle: Abandoning his affluent background, a man chases his musical dreams. However, he finds himself employed as a driver and becomes smitten with his boss's daughter.

title: Chowdhury Paribar
subTitle: A man expends all his efforts to keep his family together. However, his wife and older brother thwart his plans by creating rifts within the family.

title: Mone Mone
subTitle: Shakuntala strives to support her family after her father's untimely death. Later, a man falls in love with her and makes her a promise.
